summary: PR #2129 matched and named a large set of VS Records mndiagram2 functions, added Diagram2-related types/headers/statics, renamed mndiagram2 symbols from address-style names to semantic names, and applied matching lessons back to mndiagram formatting, ranking, KO/fall total, and index-navigation helpers. The PR body says mndiagram2 functions and structs were documented/named based on Dolphin debugger validation; the bot report records 21 new matches and 19 improvements, including complete matches in both mndiagram2 and mndiagram.

key_files.role: Large implementation and documentation pass for mndiagram2; introduced includes, helper macros/inlines, local structs/unions, stat classification helpers, UI row/header/input/ranking/detail-view functions, and many named functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndiagram2.c added 1391 deleted 5

review_comments.md: hunk shows expansion from address-named mnDiagram2_80243A3C to documented functions such as mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat, mnDiagram2_ClearStatRows, mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader, mnDiagram2_HandleInput
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists new matches and improvements in main/melee/mn/mndiagram2

key_files.role: Applied matching improvements learned from mndiagram2 back to existing mndiagram code, including formatting loops, total KO/fall helpers, ranked-fighter logic, name/fighter navigation, and added static data.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c added 212 deleted 211

diff.diff: mndiagram.c rewrites mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber, mnDiagram_FormatTime, mnDiagram_IntToStr, mnDiagram_GetPrev/NextNameIndex, mnDiagram_GetPrev/NextFighterIndex and splits sum helpers behind PAD_STACK wrappers

text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists mndiagram matches for mnDiagram_FormatTime, mnDiagram_GetRankedFighterForName, mnDiagram_GetNameTotalFalls, mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber, mnDiagram_GetFighterTotalKOs/Falls, name/fighter index helpers, and mnDiagram_IntToStr

key_files.role: Renamed mndiagram2 text symbols from address-style or fn_ names to semantic function names.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: config/GALE01/symbols.txt added 21 deleted 21

diff.diff: mnDiagram2_80243A3C..mnDiagram2_80245AE4 and fn_80243D40/fn_80244D20/fn_80244F68/fn_80245028 renamed to mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat, mnDiagram2_HandleInput, mnDiagram2_OnAnimComplete, mnDiagram2_Think, mnDiagram2_FreeUserData, etc.

key_files.role: Added Diagram2-related type definitions used by the mndiagram2 implementation.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/types.h added 81 deleted 0
review_comments.md: hunk comment says Diagram2 struct is defined in mn/types.h

key_files.role: Updated public declarations for mndiagram2 functions/types.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndiagram2.h added 28 deleted 1

key_files.role: Added static declarations for mndiagram2 globals referenced by mndiagram2.c and mndiagram.c.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndiagram2.static.h added 36 deleted 0
review_comments.md: hunk includes mndiagram2.static.h and comments that mnDiagram_ArchiveData, mnDiagram2_804D6C18, and mnDiagram_804A0834 are defined there

key_files.role: Adjusted mndiagram declarations to reflect changed signatures or recovered signatures.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndiagram.h added 5 deleted 5
diff.diff: mndiagram.c changes several functions from u8 idx parameters to s32 idx and mnDiagram_FormatTime seconds from u32 to s32

key_files.role: Recovered a concrete prototype for gm_80160C90.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: gm_80160C90 changed from UNK_RET gm_80160C90(UNK_PARAMS) to void gm_80160C90(HSD_Text* text, u8 fighter_id, s32 arg2)
diff.diff: added typedef struct Diagram2 Diagram2

key_files.role: Removed one static declaration, likely moved or superseded by mndiagram2.static.h context.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndiagram.static.h added 0 deleted 1

what_changed.text: Implemented or substantially filled out mndiagram2.c, replacing a tiny address-named stub surface with documented functions for stat type classification, row clearing, header updates, input handling, stat value lookup, row creation/population, animation callbacks, scroll arrows, user data lifecycle, creation/init, ranked fighter/name computation, aggregated rank, and detail-view cleanup.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: large hunk starts with int mnDiagram2_80243A3C(u8 arg0) becoming bool mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat(u8 stat_type) and subsequent functions
diff.diff: symbols.txt lists semantic names for 21 mndiagram2 functions

what_changed.text: Renamed 21 mndiagram2 symbols in symbols.txt from address-style/fn_ names to semantic mnDiagram2_* names.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt replacement block at mndiagram2 addresses 0x80243A3C through 0x80245AE4

what_changed.text: Recovered or adjusted headers and forward declarations, including Diagram2 forward declaration and a concrete gm_80160C90 signature.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: src/melee/mn/forward.h adds typedef struct Diagram2 Diagram2
diff.diff: src/melee/gm/gm_1601.h changes gm_80160C90 to void gm_80160C90(HSD_Text* text, u8 fighter_id, s32 arg2)

what_changed.text: Reworked mndiagram.c functions toward cleaner indexed loops and helper extraction, including replacing pointer-walk formatting code with array-index loops and splitting sum helpers into static inline bodies wrapped by public PAD_STACK functions where needed.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber, mnDiagram_FormatTime, mnDiagram_IntToStr rewrites
diff.diff: mnDiagram_SumNameFalls and mnDiagram_SumFighterFalls introduced with public wrappers preserving PAD_STACK

what_changed.text: PR report recorded measurable matching progress: +0.09% matched code, +3424 bytes, 21 new matches, and 19 improvements in unmatched functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev[bot] report for GALE01 says matched code 50.85% (+0.09%, +3424 bytes), 21 new matches, 19 improvements

smart_moves.text: The author used mndiagram2 work to refine related mndiagram functions instead of treating the files independently, consistent with the PR body's claim that mndiagram2 learnings were applied back to mndiagram.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: 'apply some learnings from these back to mndiagram as well to improve some of those matches'
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists new mndiagram matches alongside mndiagram2 matches

smart_moves.text: Address-style function names were promoted to descriptive names only where the PR also added bodies/documentation and symbol-table updates, keeping symbol naming and source names aligned.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: symbols.txt renames address-style functions to semantic mnDiagram2 names
review_comments.md: mndiagram2.c hunk shows matching semantic function names and doc comments

smart_moves.text: Recovered header prototypes and forwards instead of relying only on source-local declarations for newly understood interfaces.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: gm_1601.h gm_80160C90 signature recovery
diff.diff: forward.h Diagram2 forward declaration
changed_files.jsonl: mndiagram2.h and mndiagram.h changed

decomp_lessons.lesson: When related menu pages share stat/ranking/formatting behavior, progress in one file can expose source shapes that improve matches in its sibling file.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: follow-up and applying mndiagram2 learnings back to mndiagram
text_corpus.jsonl: mndiagram2 and mndiagram both gained new matches/improvements in the same PR

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small formatting helpers may match better as direct indexed for-loops over buffers rather than pointer-increment loops, when the surrounding codegen supports that form.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber and mnDiagram_IntToStr switch from ptr++ forms to buf[i] assignments
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report shows mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber and mnDiagram_IntToStr reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: A public wrapper can preserve required stack shape while delegating logic to a static inline helper, as seen in mndiagram fall-total functions.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDiagram_GetNameTotalFalls and mnDiagram_GetFighterTotalFalls become wrappers with PAD_STACK(16) returning static inline helper results
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report shows both fall-total functions reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Reviewer feedback favors enum case labels over raw numeric case values when an enum exists for stat categories.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: ribbanya asks 'Why not just use the enum values in the case?'
review_comments.md: hunk shows cases such as VSSTAT_PLAY_TIME, VSSTAT_WALK_DISTANCE, VSSTAT_HIT_PERCENTAGE, VSSTAT_MOST_PLAYED

naming_conventions.convention: mndiagram2 semantic function names use the mnDiagram2_ prefix followed by an action or predicate in UpperCamelCase, e.g. mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat, mnDiagram2_ClearStatRows, mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader, mnDiagram2_HandleInput.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: symbols.txt mndiagram2 rename block
review_comments.md: function definitions in mndiagram2.c hunk

naming_conventions.convention: Boolean classifier helpers are named with Is*Stat and take a stat_type argument, with enum case labels documenting the supported VSSTAT_* categories.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat, mnDiagram2_IsDistanceStat, mnDiagram2_IsPercentageStat, mnDiagram2_IsIconOnlyStat definitions

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered menu data structs are named around the owning page and UI role when evidence supports it, e.g. Diagram2, Diagram2DetailView, mnDiagram2_SortEntry; uncertain temporary types keep comments/todos rather than overclaiming exact ownership.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: defines mnDiagram2_SortEntry, JObjContainer with @todo, Diagram2DetailView, and notes Diagram2 is in mn/types.h

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered signatures should be reflected in owning headers, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when the body evidence supports parameter and return types.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: gm_80160C90 prototype changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void gm_80160C90(HSD_Text* text, u8 fighter_id, s32 arg2)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use PAD_STACK narrowly in wrappers or functions where stack shape appears to matter, while keeping the main logic in a cleaner helper when possible.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDiagram_GetNameTotalFalls and mnDiagram_GetFighterTotalFalls wrappers retain PAD_STACK(16) and call static inline helpers
review_comments.md: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader contains PAD_STACK(8)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Try local static inline helpers for repeated or mode-dependent logic, such as selecting entity index or refreshing stat rows.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: static inline mnDiagram_GetEntityByIndex selects name vs fighter
review_comments.md: static inline mnDiagram2_RefreshStatRows clears and repopulates stat rows

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Represent 64-bit sorting/data reinterpretation explicitly with a union when the function needs alternate f64/u64/field views.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: mnDiagram2_SortEntry union contains named field view, f64 view, and u64 value view

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use enum constants in switch cases for stat-type classifiers rather than retaining raw numeric case labels.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: reviewer asks why not use enum values in case
review_comments.md: classifier helpers show VSSTAT_* case labels

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Why not just use the enum values in the `case`?
review_feedback.interpretation: The review comment directly recommends using available enum values in switch cases instead of numeric constants for mndiagram2 stat-type checks.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: discussion_r2727682121

follow_up_queries: mndiagram2 enum values case VSSTAT reviewer
mnDiagram2_SortEntry union f64 u64 sorting operations
mndiagram PAD_STACK wrapper static inline helper falls
mndiagram2 Dolphin debugger validation structs Diagram2

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed files, merged state, counts
human_pr_text.md: author intent and Dolphin debugger validation claim
review_comments.md: one review comment plus mndiagram2.c hunk
raw_diff.diff: diff excerpt for symbols, headers, and mndiagram.c changes

notes: Strong evidence for changed files, symbol renames, header changes, review feedback, and bot-reported match/improvement results.
The loaded raw diff and review comments are truncated, so not every changed hunk in mndiagram2.c, types.h, or headers is visible.

The PR body claims Dolphin debugger validation for naming/documentation, but the slice does not include the debugger notes themselves; treat validation as an author-stated basis, not independently verified evidence.
No local build, objdiff command output, or final review resolution is included beyond the decomp-dev bot report and merged metadata.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Sibling menu pages can cross-inform matching shapes
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2129, matching mndiagram2 functions also improved existing mndiagram functions; when menu pages share stat/ranking/formatting behavior, inspect sibling files for loop, helper, signature, and data-shape clues.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: applying mndiagram2 learnings back to mndiagram
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report shows matches/improvements in both units

accepted_candidate_records.title: Enum labels are preferred in recovered switch cases when available
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2129 review feedback asked why stat classifier switch cases did not simply use enum values; recovered switch cases over known stat types should use VSSTAT_* labels rather than raw numeric constants when the enum is known.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: ribbanya review comment
review_comments.md: classifier helpers with VSSTAT_* case labels

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use narrow PAD_STACK wrappers around cleaner helper logic
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2129 shows mndiagram fall-total functions preserving PAD_STACK in public wrappers while moving summation logic into static inline helpers, resulting in reported 100% matches for the affected functions.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDiagram_SumNameFalls and mnDiagram_SumFighterFalls plus PAD_STACK wrappers
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report for mnDiagram_GetNameTotalFalls and mnDiagram_GetFighterTotalFalls

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer enum constants over raw case values in recovered switches
source_update_candidates.text: When a recovered switch dispatches over a known enum, use the enum constants in case labels instead of raw numeric literals, provided the enum mapping is established by headers/source evidence.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: 'Why not just use the enum values in the case?'
review_comments.md: VSSTAT_* cases in mnDiagram2 stat classifier helpers
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a reviewer-supported readability/naming convention not explicitly called out as a global standard in the loaded standards.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram and mndiagram2 share VS Records stat/ranking behavior
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2129 indicates mndiagram2 matching exposed learnings that improved mndiagram matches, especially around VS Records stat/ranking/formatting helpers.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: author says mndiagram2 learnings were applied back to mndiagram
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists mndiagram and mndiagram2 matches/improvements
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level relationship for future matching searches; should be curator-reviewed before becoming a path fact.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the Dolphin debugger validation claim into a verified naming standard without the underlying validation notes or screenshots.

Do not infer that all mndiagram2 names are permanently canonical solely from this slice; the diff shows names accepted in a merged PR, but broader naming authority should come from current source/symbols.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK usage as preferred style; in this PR it appears as a narrow matching tactic with reported match benefit, consistent with standards requiring evidence.
